questions.statement: <p>A 800 m long train crossed a man coming from opposite direction in 8 seconds. If speed of the train is 90 m/s, then find the speed of man.</p>

A and B can complete a task in 50 days, B and C can complete it in 37.5 days while C and A can do the same task together in 30 days, How many days will A, B and C each take complete the task individually?

<p>Find the value of ? in the following question?</p>

<p><span class="math-tex">\(\dfrac{0.49 x^2 + 0.09 y^2 + 0.42 xy}{0.4 x + 0.3x +0.3y}=?\)</span></p>
If A is twice as efficient as B, and A and B together can complete a work in 20 days, then find the number of days in which B can do the work alone.
P and Q can do some work individually in 8 and 16 days respectively. They work together and completed the work. What is the ratio of work done by P and Q, when the work was completed?
Pipe X can fill a tank&nbsp; 5 times as fast as pipe Z. If both the two pipes can fill the tank in 10 minutes, then find the time pipe Z will take to fill the tank alone.
L is thrice as good a workman as M, and together, they finish a task in 12 days. In how many days will L alone finish the same task?
<p>Pipes P and Q can fill a tank in 12 hours and 36 hours respectively. If both pipes are opened then, how much time (in hours) it will take to fill the tank?</p>
If sec&theta; + tan&theta; = 2, then find the value of sin&theta;.

The radius of a circle with centre P is 8 cm. If the chord AB of the circle makes a right angle at P, then find the area of ​​the minor segment.
Three cubes with diagonal length of 18&radic;3 cm are joined together to make a cuboid. What is the total surface area of the newly made cuboid?&nbsp;

Mohan takes 4 round daily along the sides of a square park of side 50 m. Then, find out that how much distance is covered by him daily?
If the median and mode of a data set are 26.5 and 32 respectively then find the mean of the data set?
<p>For the given data 23, 31, 43, 37, 51, 61, a, 32, 23, 27, 19. Mean is 33, find the median for the given set.&nbsp;</p>
